# Hotel Siddhi Vinayak — Jodhpur, Rajasthan

> A comfortable, well-located hotel in Jodhpur ("the Blue City"), Rajasthan, India,
> offering clean air-conditioned rooms, warm hospitality, free Wi-Fi, free parking
> and a 24x7 front desk — minutes from the railway station and Mehrangarh Fort.

- Canonical website: https://hotelsiddhi-vinayak.com
- Location: MG Hospital Road, Medical Market, opposite M.G. Hospital, Jalori Gate, Rawaton Ka Bass, Jodhpur, Rajasthan 342001, India
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 98290 00000
- Email: stay@hotelsiddhi-vinayak.com
- Guest rating: 3.7 / 5 from 791+ Google reviews
- Check-in: 12:00 PM · Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Best rate: book direct by Call / WhatsApp +91 98290 00000 — no booking fees, no OTA commission.

## Room categories & tariff (EP / room-only, per night)
- Deluxe Room — from ₹1200 · 2 guests · 1 double bed · ~220 sq ft · 7 rooms · budget-friendly.
- Super Deluxe Room — from ₹1350 · 2–3 guests · 1 king bed · ~300 sq ft · 9 rooms · premium value.
- Triple Deluxe Room — from ₹1400 · 3 guests · ~320 sq ft · 3 rooms · ideal for three guests.
- Family Four Bed Room — from ₹1800 · 4 guests · 2 double beds · ~450 sq ft · 1 room · best for families.

## Amenities
Free high-speed Wi-Fi, free on-site parking with EV charging point, air
conditioning, 24x7 front desk, sun terrace, travel/tour desk, in-house vegetarian
restaurant, room service, daily housekeeping, hot water. Breakfast available on
request (continental / à la carte / vegetarian). Paid airport/railway pickup.
About 350 m from Jodhpur Railway Station.

## Nearby attractions (distance from hotel)
- Mehrangarh Fort — 5 km (~15 min drive)
- Jaswant Thada — 5.5 km
- Umaid Bhawan Palace — 6 km
- Clock Tower & Sardar Market — 3 km
- Toorji Ka Jhalra Stepwell — 3.2 km
- Mandore Gardens — 9 km

## Frequently asked questions
- Check-in is from 12:00 PM and check-out is by 11:00 AM; early/late possible on request.
- The hotel is centrally located opposite M.G. Hospital near Jalori Gate, close to the railway station, bus stand and old city.
- Free high-speed Wi-Fi is available in all rooms and common areas.
- Free on-site parking is available for guests travelling by car.
- The hotel has an in-house vegetarian restaurant plus room service.
- Mehrangarh Fort is about 3–4 km away (~10–15-minute drive).
- Airport/station pickup and drop can be arranged (paid) — share arrival details via WhatsApp.
- To book: use the WhatsApp button, call directly, or submit the inquiry form on the Contact page.

## Best time to visit Jodhpur
October to March (pleasant desert climate). Winter (Nov–Feb) is peak season — book early.

Last updated: 2026-06-14
